summary: Full end-to-end frontend test of the redesigned Portuguese Polícia Judiciária dossier (PWA). All 11 acceptance criteria in the review request PASSED with zero JS errors. Tested: sober PT auth screen (completes in ~5.14s with 0→100% progress and status cycling), top bar with live clock, classification band, letterhead (REPÚBLICA PORTUGUESA / POLÍCIA JUDICIÁRIA / Diretoria do Norte · Unidade de Pessoas Desaparecidas), PROCESSO TT-24-07-26, DESAPARECIDO(A) pill + red rotated carimbo, evidence photo (loads 805x1200), identification data (KAYE / Rio Tinto, Porto / 24 de julho de 2026), timeline with 3 dated items, PARTICIPAR NA INVESTIGAÇÃO WhatsApp href (wa.me/351900000000 + PT message containing 'investigação TT-24-07-26'), LOCALIZADO state (green pill+stamp, TEN TOES, 3 stream anchors with '· BREVE', PROCESSO ENCERRADO), ?nointro=1 skip, PWA manifest (name contains 'Processo TT-24-07-26', lang pt-PT), service-worker.js returns valid JS (cache v3), all /assets/* return 200, mobile 390x844 layout is clean with no horizontal overflow.
critical_code_review_comments: script.js runAuth() blocks the initial view for ~5s with no way to skip except ?nointro=1 or prefers-reduced-motion. Acceptable per spec but consider a small 'Saltar' link for accessibility.
buildStreamLinks(): when URL is empty the anchor href defaults to '#'. Consider event.preventDefault() on click to avoid a jarring scroll to top when users tap a '· BREVE' link.

service-worker.js pre-caches '/' + '/index.html' as separate entries; ensure they map to identical bytes to avoid stale-HTML issues after future deploys (bump CACHE name when updating - currently v3 which is correct).
test_credentials: None required — static PWA, no auth backend.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The site is a pure static PWA served from CRA /public. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL as base. Use /?nointro=1 to skip the 5s Portuguese auth screen; use /?nointro=1#estado=LOCALIZADO to inspect the FOUND state without needing to press 'f' (which reloads via location.reload). Do NOT navigate the WhatsApp href — just assert the href value. The service worker (v3) caches the shell — if you see stale English content, unregister SW and hard reload. All key elements expose data-testid: system-clock, classified-badge, case-id, status-pill, case-stamp, evidence-frame, datum-name, join-investigation-btn, release-song, stream-links, foot-case, stream-spotify/apple-music/youtube.
